overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut character with glowing purple thrusters flying at warp speed through a colorful hyperspace tunnel toward a large red-orange planet. The scene features vibrant radiating light streaks in multiple colors as the camera follows the character's rapid approach through deep space.

scene_state.functional_zone: hyperspace warp corridor in deep space

agents.ego_description: astronaut character with active purple thrusters flying steadily forward through the warp tunnel toward the distant planet

entered.detail: large reddish-orange planetary body with visible surface details and craters
radiating lines of light in green, blue, yellow and purple creating a hyperspace velocity effect

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an astronaut flying through a vibrant hyperspace corridor. Colorful light streaks radiate outward from the center of the screen, creating a sense of extreme velocity. A large red planet is visible ahead in the distance, gradually growing larger as the character approaches.

events.description: planet grows to dominate the frame as the distance closes significantly

agents.ego_description: continuing high-speed approach toward the planet as it fills the viewport, maintaining steady thrust

segments.scene_description: The approach continues with the red planet now dominating the center of the frame, having grown from a distant object to a massive planetary body filling the view. The colorful warp streaks persist, maintaining the sense of high-velocity space travel as the character closes the final distance to the planet's surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-velocity journey through a vibrant hyperspace corridor that culminates in a close approach to a massive celestial body. It begins with a third-person view of an astronaut soaring through a tunnel of radiating, colorful light streaks that emphasize extreme speed. As the character surges forward, a distant red planet gradually expands in the center of the frame, growing from a small orb into a looming presence. The scene then shifts as the planetary body begins to dominate the entire field of view, filling the screen while the warp streaks persist around the edges. Finally, the camera closes the remaining distance, maintaining its rapid momentum until the red-orange surface of the planet looms large.
